## Maintainer Workflow Impact

- [ ] PR review support
- [ ] Issue triage
- [ ] Release workflow
- [ ] Security or policy checks
- [ ] Documentation only

## Safety

- [ ] No new GitHub App permissions
- [ ] No raw repository content persistence
- [ ] No external AI transfer without explicit policy opt-in
- [ ] Write actions remain dry-run or approval-gated

## Verification

```sh
npm run check
```
